Enter domain-specific terms (comma or ne: Enter domain-specific terms (comma or newline separated) to improve ASR accuracy. Use 'wrong -> correct' for explicit replacement. E.g.: Claude Cowork, called cowork -> Claude Cowork

Enable if your LLM supports JSON mode ou: Enable if your LLM supports JSON mode output
If enabled, use antigravity-cli to call: If enabled, use antigravity-cli to call LLM, ignoring above settings
Send all subtitle data to LLM in large b: Send all subtitle data to LLM in large batches to reduce API calls. Automatically falls back to standard mode on failure.
Automatically burn subtitles to video af: Automatically burn subtitles to video after processing, skipping the manual review step
Select a profile to load or delete: Select a profile to load or delete
Number of audio files to generate in par: Number of audio files to generate in parallel. Increase for faster processing, but be aware of API limits.
Skip extracting reference audio from the: Skip extracting reference audio from the original video. Useful when using fixed TTS voices.
Successfully downloaded and applied offi: Successfully downloaded and applied official subtitles (type: {type}), WhisperX will be bypassed!
Downloaded subtitles but failed to parse: Downloaded subtitles but failed to parse them.
No English subtitles found (WhisperX wil: No English subtitles found (WhisperX will be used).
No English subtitles found (original or: No English subtitles found (original or auto-generated) for this link.
Maximum number of sentences sent to LLM: Maximum number of sentences sent to LLM in one batch. Set to 0 to send all sentences at once. Reduce this value if you experience model context or timeout errors.
When your agy login expires during run,: When your agy login expires during run, paste the google authorization code here and click retry to automatically authenticate and resume.
Maximum number of subtitle lines transla: Maximum number of subtitle lines translated by LLM in one batch. Set to 0 to send all. Reduce this value if translation experiences timeouts.
